title: WynnExtras
description: Wynncraft QoL mod. Bank overlay, profile viewer, raid features, crafting features and much more!
body:
Features:

Bank Overlay

A custom Bank Overlay, inspired by NEU's Hypixel Skyblock Storage overlay! Includes search filters and an "All characters mode" which allows you to scroll and search through all bank pages on all of you characters!

In-game profile & Guild viewer

A custom gui that lets you easily check someones stats! Use ``/pv `` to check them out! (or just ``/pv`` to check your own!)

Use ``/gv [prefix]`` to view the stats of a guild! You also see every member and clicking on them will show you their stats in the pv! You can also click on a players guild in the pv to view their guild!

Custom class selection screen

Replaces the vanilla with a custom screen which offers rearrangeable classes, custom class descriptions, customizable colors and more!

Crafting Helper

Click on the recipe you want to craft and it automatically loads in the materials! The helper is resizable by dragging at the bottom! You also have a profession bomb display at the top showing you where prof bombs are and how long they last! If the world you're currently on doesn't have any active prof bomb you can click on the world and it will switch there! You also have three different buttons: - "Load from Clipboard": loads a recipe from a wynnbuilder link - "Reuse Last": loads the last recipe you crafted - "Auto start": if enabled, automatically starts crafting when clicking one of the two buttons above

Weekly Lootpools

See the current weekly raid and lootrun lootpools with ``/we lootpool``! You can scan your own aspects with ``/we aspects scan`` to see a personal score for each raid!

Skillpoint helper

Shows you your currently active armor while in the compass menu and adds a button to automatically assign skill points for your current build!

Waypoints

Highlight blocks at specific coordinates!

- Create, edit, and delete waypoints in the GUI - Assign waypoints to categories with custom colors - Toggle visibility per category - Each waypoint has three independent visibility modes: - Block — highlights the block at the location - Name — displays the waypoint name - Distance — shows the distance between the player and waypoint → You can toggle each of these modes individually for every waypoint!

- `/WynnExtras waypoints` → Opens the waypoint GUI - `/WynnExtras waypoints add` → Adds a waypoint below the player - `/WynnExtras waypoints remove` → Removes the closest waypoint

Raid List

Use /we Raidlist to see your raids! You can filter them with the text bar on top or by clicking on the raid icons! Clicking the trophy icon will sort them by completion time!

Raid Timestamps!

Chat Channels!

Easily lets you chat in different channels, while still seing every message! (/chat a/p/g)

Chat Notificator!

Notifies you when certain words/phrases appear in chat! Inspired by Skytil's chat notifier!

Chat Blocker/Filter!

Blocks messages with certain words/phrases!

Player hider!

Use /we playerhider add/remove to add or remove a player from the list! Players on the list will be hidden if they're within a certian range. The range can be changed in the config! There's also a quick way to toggle the feature: /we playerhider toggle!

But this is not everything WynnExtras has to offer! You can also take a look at the galery tab for more! If you have any kind of feedback, suggestions or bug reports you're welcome to report them on our Discord! Thank you for reading and (potentially) using WynnExtras <3
